name: Arun Parthiban
summary: Backend Developer with 7 years of experience building REST APIs and microservices in Python/Django, deployed on AWS. Demonstrated expertise in microservices architecture, cloud migrations, and team mentorship. Proven ability to design scalable backend systems and lead engineering teams.

primarySkillset.name: Python
primarySkillset.comments: Core language used across all three employers for APIs, automation, and batch jobs.

primarySkillset.name: Django / Django REST Framework
primarySkillset.comments: Used extensively at TechNova Solutions for microservices and REST API design.

primarySkillset.name: AWS
primarySkillset.comments: Used for ECS container deployments and cloud migrations; holds AWS Solutions Architect certification.

primarySkillset.name: Java
primarySkillset.comments: Used at TechNova (Spring Boot) and Skyline Tech (batch jobs), spanning multiple roles.

primarySkillset.name: Flask
primarySkillset.comments: Used at Skyline Tech Solutions for REST APIs serving 1M+ requests/day.

primarySkillset.name: PostgreSQL
primarySkillset.comments: Administered PostgreSQL databases at Placeholder Global Systems; likely continued usage.

primarySkillset.name: Redis
primarySkillset.comments: Implemented caching layer at Skyline Tech to improve API response times.

primarySkillset.name: Docker
primarySkillset.comments: Used in containerized AWS ECS deployments at TechNova Solutions.

primarySkillset.name: Kubernetes
primarySkillset.comments: Listed as a secondary technical skill; assumed used in cloud infrastructure context.

primarySkillset.name: Linux
primarySkillset.comments: Foundational skill across all roles spanning 7+ years of backend development.

primarySkillset.name: Java Spring Boot
primarySkillset.comments: Used at TechNova Solutions for microservices architecture design.

primarySkillset.name: AWS ECS
primarySkillset.comments: Led migration of monolithic application to AWS ECS, achieving 60% reduction in deployment time.

secondarySkillset.name: Microservices Architecture
secondarySkillset.comments: Designed microservices architecture at TechNova Solutions using DRF and Spring Boot.

secondarySkillset.name: Team Mentorship & Leadership
secondarySkillset.comments: Mentored a team of 4 backend engineers on coding standards and code review practices.

secondarySkillset.name: Code Review Practices
secondarySkillset.comments: Established and enforced code review standards at TechNova Solutions.

secondarySkillset.name: Agile / Backend Development Lifecycle
secondarySkillset.comments: Implied across all roles through structured delivery and team collaboration.

secondarySkillset.name: JUnit (Testing)
secondarySkillset.comments: Listed as a secondary skill; associated with Java-based development at Skyline Tech.

secondarySkillset.name: Database Administration
secondarySkillset.comments: Supported PostgreSQL DBA tasks at Placeholder Global Systems.

secondarySkillset.name: Automation Scripting
secondarySkillset.comments: Developed internal automation scripts using Python at Placeholder Global Systems.

secondarySkillset.name: API Design & Optimization
secondarySkillset.comments: Core competency demonstrated across all three roles including high-traffic REST APIs.

responsibilities: Designed microservices architecture using Django REST Framework and Java Spring Boot.
Migrated monolithic application to AWS ECS containers, reducing deployment time by 60%.
Mentored a team of 4 backend engineers on coding standards and code review practices.
Built and maintained REST APIs in Python/Flask serving 1M+ requests/day.
Implemented caching layer with Redis to improve API response times.
Wrote Java-based batch jobs for nightly data processing.
Developed internal automation scripts using Python.

strengths: Strong Python and Django expertise spanning 7 years with demonstrated use across multiple production environments.
Proven cloud migration experience with AWS ECS resulting in measurable deployment efficiency gains (60% reduction).
Leadership capability evidenced by mentoring a team of 4 engineers and establishing code review standards.
Broad backend technology stack covering Python, Java, Flask, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes.
High-traffic API development experience with systems handling 1M+ requests/day.
gaps: No mention of formal education performance metrics or GPA, limiting academic assessment.
Certifications portfolio is limited to a single AWS credential; additional cloud or backend certifications would strengthen the profile.
No evidence of system design documentation, architectural diagrams, or open-source contributions.
Limited visibility into frontend or full-stack exposure, which may restrict versatility in smaller team settings.

name: Saravanan Sundarrajan
summary: Full Stack Developer with 6 years of experience designing and building scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and AWS. Proven track record in migrating legacy systems, building reusable component libraries, and integrating cloud services for asynchronous processing pipelines.

primarySkillset.name: React JS
primarySkillset.comments: Core frontend framework used across multiple roles; led legacy jQuery to React migration and built reusable component libraries.

primarySkillset.name: JavaScript
primarySkillset.comments: Foundational language used throughout entire career from junior to senior roles.

primarySkillset.name: Node.js
primarySkillset.comments: Used in backend API development and integration work across multiple positions.

primarySkillset.name: AWS
primarySkillset.comments: Integrated AWS S3 and Lambda for file processing pipelines in current role.

primarySkillset.name: TypeScript
primarySkillset.comments: Used with React for e-commerce platform UI development at Nexus Digital Labs.

primarySkillset.name: Express.js
primarySkillset.comments: Used alongside Node.js for REST API integration at Nexus Digital Labs.

primarySkillset.name: MongoDB
primarySkillset.comments: Listed as a secondary technical skill with hands-on project usage implied.

primarySkillset.name: Docker
primarySkillset.comments: Listed in technical skills; depth of usage not explicitly detailed in project work.

primarySkillset.name: REST APIs
primarySkillset.comments: Consistent API integration work across frontend and backend responsibilities.

primarySkillset.name: Git
primarySkillset.comments: Version control used throughout career; CI/CD pipelines built with GitHub Actions.

primarySkillset.name: CI/CD
primarySkillset.comments: Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions to automate deployments at Nexus Digital Labs.

primarySkillset.name: jQuery
primarySkillset.comments: Used in junior role for internal tools; subsequently migrated legacy jQuery dashboards to React.

secondarySkillset.name: Agile/Scrum
secondarySkillset.comments: Consistent methodology across multiple roles; holds Certified Scrum Master credential.

secondarySkillset.name: Component-Driven Development
secondarySkillset.comments: Built reusable component libraries adopted across 5 internal products.

secondarySkillset.name: Cross-Team Collaboration
secondarySkillset.comments: Collaborated with backend teams on API integration and shared UI module development.

secondarySkillset.name: Performance Optimization
secondarySkillset.comments: Achieved 40% page load improvement through React migration initiative.

secondarySkillset.name: Technical Documentation
secondarySkillset.comments: Wrote unit tests and documentation for shared UI modules starting from junior role.

secondarySkillset.name: Unit Testing
secondarySkillset.comments: Practiced from junior level; wrote unit tests for shared UI modules.

secondarySkillset.name: Asynchronous Processing
secondarySkillset.comments: Designed asynchronous file processing pipelines using AWS Lambda and S3.

secondarySkillset.name: Responsive Design
secondarySkillset.comments: Developed responsive UI components for e-commerce platform at Nexus Digital Labs.

responsibilities: Led migration of a legacy jQuery dashboard to React, improving page load time by 40%.
Built reusable component library adopted across 5 internal products, reducing code duplication.
Integrated AWS S3 and Lambda for asynchronous file processing pipelines.
Developed responsive UI components with React and TypeScript for an e-commerce platform.
Collaborated with backend team on Node.js/Express REST API integration.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions to automate deployments.
Assisted in building internal tools using JavaScript and jQuery.
Wrote unit tests and documentation for shared UI modules.

strengths: Strong React expertise with demonstrated impact including a 40% page load improvement through a legacy migration project.
End-to-end full stack capability spanning React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and AWS cloud services.
Solid DevOps awareness with hands-on CI/CD pipeline implementation using GitHub Actions.
Dual certification in AWS and Scrum Master demonstrating both technical and methodological commitment.
Proven ability to build scalable, reusable UI components adopted across multiple internal products.
gaps: Limited visibility into database design and management depth despite MongoDB being listed as a skill.
No mention of system design, architecture decision-making, or technical leadership beyond team collaboration.
AWS usage appears narrow (S3 and Lambda only); broader cloud service exposure such as EC2, RDS, or ECS is not evidenced.
No evidence of open-source contributions, side projects, or portfolio work to further validate technical depth.
